title: phalaenopsis × rolfeana
intro: Phalaenopsis × rolfeana, also known as the Rolfe's moth orchid, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Phalaenopsis genus and is a cross between Phalaenopsis and Paphiopedilum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Phalaenopsis × rolfeana include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
